title: Make authentication optional for local testing
description: Early testing is single-user and admin/login setup is slowing iteration. Add a safe local-dev auth bypass while keeping production auth enabled by default.
close_reason: Implemented local auth-disabled testing mode with protected non-local defaults.

title: Install Beads integrations for Codex and Claude

title: Set up fresh clone local environment
description: Track local setup after a fresh clone: install Python and Node dependencies, run migrations, hydrate bd issues from JSONL, verify quality gates, and start the app locally.

title: Upgrade frontend test toolchain to resolve npm audit findings
